creator: sprague_rick@rastar.merseine.nu
text:
I sent the following but it didn't show up in the audit trail.

Monty

*******************************

    Sorry it took so long, been very busy not to mention a complete
    rebuild of my system - sans zfs.  With a new 8-stable, vbox was one
    of my first ports.  Still getting the same problem.  Included is my
    log.


    Monty


======================================
